Title: Lead Power Platform Developer | Full-Stack Software Engineer
Description: Leading development of an enterprise AI platform using React Native for desktop, Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Functions, Vault) for backend, consolidating organizational LLM usage and enabling shared context across teams. Research and implement AI-assisted development workflows using Cursor, Copilot, and Claude, applying agentic AI frameworks to automate documentation, improve code review quality, and accelerate feature prototyping. Maintain 15+ Microsoft Power Platform and SharePoint solutions for a federal program; define governance frameworks, development standards, and best practices to meet federal guidelines. Mentor 1 developer and assist 2 testers with automated testing integration for Canvas and Model-driven apps; lead code reviews and reusable component development. Expand Power Platform footprint as legacy SharePoint 2016/Nintex workflows and .NET applications are decommissioned and migrated to modern solutions. Automate environment management with PowerShell and Python; co-administer shared Dev/Test environments while coordinating with DevOps for staging and production.

Title: Power Platform Developer | Full-Stack Software Developer
Description: Developed and maintained full-stack applications using Angular, React, Next.js, NestJS, LoopBack, and .NET with PostgreSQL and MongoDB backends, improving data accessibility and reducing vulnerabilities. Designed and deployed Power Platform solutions; integrated Power BI dashboards for real-time reporting and KPI-aligned insights. Led a SharePoint migration for 200+ users; implemented Microsoft Entra ID authentication with zero downtime using Angular and modern authentication patterns. Built an Approval Request system (Power Apps + Power Automate + SharePoint), reducing approval cycle time by 50% and tracking 400+ requests annually. Architected secure on-prem access with Azure On-Premises Data Gateway, Key Vault, and REST APIs, saving $50K–$200K annually.

Title: Power Platform Developer
Description: Launched a centralized request management system, automating approvals and reducing processing time by 40%. Authored Power BI reports for leadership, improving visibility into project status and resource allocation. Built a Monthly Status Report Management solution, automating reporting workflows and reducing manual workload by 35%. Partnered with cross-functional teams to automate processes, cutting administrative overhead by 30%.

Title: Computer Science Trainee
Description: Built dashboards and web applications using Node.js, Express, Angular, and LoopBack for real-time data visualization. Developed features for a resource management prototype with role-based permissions. Improved application performance via caching and query optimization, reducing load times by 30%.
